title: Charset CRE
description: Charset Cleanroom Edition. Forked to port it and finish it.
body:
# **This is a [Cleanroom Loader](https://github.com/CleanroomMC/Cleanroom) mod!**

Charset CRE is a fork of [Charset](https://charset.asie.pl/) porting it to Cleanroom (since it is incompat with newer Guava and Apache HTTP5).

This fork will add fixes, missing features and recipes to the mod.

I will fix some major incompats and errors first.

Here's the "char"s (aka modules) of Charset and their description:

- [Audio](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-audio)(♫): Record and play music discs. You can share them in server. Use [JEC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/justenoughcodec) for more codec (mp3) supports.
- [SimpleLogic Gates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplelogic-gates)(&): Simple redstone logic gates like RedPower2 or ProjectRed
- Storage(■): Including [chest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-storage-chests) and [barrels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-storage-barrels). Also includes [locks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-storage-locks) and BC-style [tanks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-storage-tanks). The chest recipes will break autocrafting system like AE2 and RS badly, I am working on a workaround on this.
- [Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-tweaks)(*): Small tweaks including glass shards, black dye from charcoal, dyeable anvil and slime block, pushable TNT, etc.
- [SimpleLogic Wires](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplelogic-wires)(+): Redstone cables like ProjectRed
- Wrench(/): Simple wrench that rotate blocks. Compatible with multipart blocks.
- [Transport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-transport-carts-and-rails): Cross rails and dyeable carts.
- [Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-tools): Signal Meter and Stop watch. Used for automation.
- [Tablet](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-tablet): All-in-one wiki page grabbed from Internet in real time. Only shows content when supported mods installed.
- [Immersion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-immersion): TFC style item placing, support ingots, plates, gears and coins. May incompat with some in-world right click crafting.
- [Block Carrying](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-block-carrying): Just like carry on, but released early, can't carry entites and only support compatible blocks.
- [Power](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-power): Steam power, rotary power and FE wires. Highly WIP and no consumers present. May overhaul that part once I figured out how to complete it...
- [Optics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-optics): Laser-based logic system, haven't figured out this completely.
- [Crafting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-crafting): A in-world grid auto-crafting somehow looks like Create, and the ability for cauldron to dye things. Maybe this could be extended to 9*9...
- Chisel: Similar to the Chisel mod, but just turning blocks into walls and stairs with same material.


**WARNING**: You need MCMultipart for audio wires/redstone wires feature
